heading: AWS (Amazon Web Services) Privatelink Connection Strings
body:
[Private Endpoint-Aware Connection Strings](private-endpoint-connection-strings)
connection strings follow this format:

```sh
mongodb://pl-0-us-east-1a.ab123.mongodb.net:1024
mongodb+srv://pl-0-us-east-1a.ab123.mongodb.net
```

If you enable the [Regionalized Private Endpoints for Multi-Region Sharded Clusters](atlas_regionalized-pl) setting, AWS PrivateLink connection strings follow
this format:

```sh
mongodb://pl-0-us-west-1.ab123.mongodb.net:1024
mongodb+srv://cluster0-pl-0-us-west-1.ab123.mongodb.net
```

URI (Uniform Resource Identifier)s using this format can be reachable via the AWS (Amazon Web Services) VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) where
someone configured PrivateLink, though access can be transitive from
other VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)s peered in turn.
